raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josuûs aizinaja tohß/nn
runnaja uß teem/ fazztdains: Ka-
pehz effat juhß muhß peewihlu-
schi? fazztdaini: Mehs effim toh-
ti tahku no jums/kur juhß tomehr
muhfo Widdi dshwojat?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad nolahdetti effat
juhß/ ka no jums ne trubkßt Kalpi/
un Malkas-Zirteji / un Uhdens-
Snehleji preeksch muhfu Deewa
Namnu. Tee atbildeja Josuûm/
un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka taiweem Kal-
peem stahstihts tappe / ko tas
KUNGStaws Deews Mobsum
farwam Kalpam pawehlejis irr/ka
wiꞥſch jums wiſhu to Semini
doht / un wiſſus tohß / kas tai
Semmê dshwo/ no juhfu Preek-
chas nomaitaht grib/tad bihaja-
mces mehs tohti muhfas Dshwo-
ſchanas deht preeksch jums / un
darrijam fcho Leetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu redsi / niehs eſtam
tawâ Rohkâ / darri mums / ka
labs un taifni irr tawâs Azzis
darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad darrija wiꞥſch teem ta/
un iſglahbe tohß no Israëta Behr-
nu Rohkas/ ka tee tohß ne nokawe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tä nodeive tohß Josuûs
tai Deenâ par Malkas-Zirtejein /
un Uhdens- Snehlejeem tahs
Draudseß / un preeksch ta KUNG-
GA Altara/ lihds fchai paschai
Deengi/ vee tahß Weetas / ko
wiꞥſch iſwehletu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Abonizedeks tas Jerusalemes Kehnisch mekla
Valihdsibu preti teem Gibeonitezeem : 1. Un
mettaßß ar tschetr zitteem Amoritezu Kehni-
xeem prett to Pilsfahtu Gibeonu : 5. Be-
Josuûs nahk teem Gibeonitezeem Valiga : 6.
Un aisdsenn tohß peejuß Kehninukß : 10. To-
pascho Karra. Spehks tohp zaar leelu Krussa
jamaitahtß : 11. Saule un Mehnes pastahw
zauru Deenu us Josuûs Luhschunu : 12/13.
Josuûs leeß tohß peejuß Kehninuß pakahrt : 26.
Un uskem dauds Kananitern Pilsfahtus : 28.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N kad Adonizedeks tas
Kehnisch no Jerusale-
mes dsirdeja/ ka Josuûs
Aju bij usnehmis/un isdeldejs/un
Ajai un winnas Kehnimam ta-
darrijs/ itt ka wiꞥſch Jerikum un
winna Kehnimam bij darrijs / un
ka tee/ kas Gibeonâ dshwoja/ ar
Israëlu bij Meeru darrijschi / un
starp teem dshwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad bihjajahß tee fohti/ jo
Gibeons bija weens leets Pils-
fahts / itt ka weens kehniskigs
Pilsfahts/ kas leelaks ne ka Aja/
un wiſſi winnas Wihri bija stipri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz fuhtija Adontze-
deß tas Kehnisch no Jerusale-
mes/ us Oänu to Kehnizu no
Eebrona/ un us Pireamu to Keh-
nizu no Jarmutes/ un us Jawin
to Kehnizu no Lahkisa/ un us De-
biru to Kehnizu no Eglona/ fazz-
zidams:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nabzeet pee mannim us
angschu/ un palihdseet man/ tad
gribbam mehs Gibeonu kaut / jo
tas irr Meeru darrijs ar Josuût/
un ar teem Israëta Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad Sapulzejahß/un zehlahß
peezi Kehnint to Amoritezu/ tas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
